item.title: 2026 Florida Cost of Living: Housing, Insurance & Hidden Expenses
item.description: Florida remains tax-friendly but costs are rising—discover 2026’s housing, insurance, and utility trends affecting your budget.

item.title: 3aa5f752e6541934: 2026 Cost of Living in Florida
item.description: Projected 2026 cost of living in Florida — housing, utilities, groceries, healthcare & regional breakdowns with actionable tips.
